name: Azure Functions

naming.description: Allows dots, colons, and hyphens in addition to POSIX chars. Colons used for nested config (e.g., ConnectionStrings:Default).

limits.notes: App Settings stored in Azure App Configuration. No documented hard limit but practical limit around a few hundred vars. Slots support slot-specific settings.

notes: Azure Functions uses App Settings (not traditional env vars). Use Key Vault references (@Microsoft.KeyVault(...)) for secrets. Deployment slots support slot-sticky settings.
